scripts.build: pnpm pack:textures:if-present && pnpm build:wasm && pnpm build:web
scripts.dev:starter-runtime: pnpm pack:textures:if-present && pnpm build:wasm && pnpm --filter @ferrum2d/starter-runtime dev
scripts.dev:minimal: pnpm pack:textures:if-present && pnpm build:wasm && pnpm --filter @ferrum2d/minimal-game dev
scripts.dev:topdown: pnpm pack:textures:if-present && pnpm build:wasm && pnpm --filter @ferrum2d/topdown-shooter dev
scripts.dev:breakout: pnpm pack:textures:if-present && pnpm build:wasm && pnpm --filter @ferrum2d/breakout dev

scripts.package:publish-check:ferrum-web: pnpm build:wasm && pnpm --filter @ferrum2d/ferrum-web build && node scripts/package/check-package-files.mjs --require-wasm-pkg --verify-pack --expect-publishable
